content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves sharply to the left with the white boundary visible on the right side, and the car appears to be on the outer (right) portion of the track navigating a tight left-hand bend.

**Waypoint analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 102, target index = (102+5) % 121 = 107
- WP107: x=1.094280, y=1.665545
- Car: x=0.942452, y=1.491505, heading=-98.266°
- dy = 1.665545 - 1.491505 = +0.174040
- dx = 1.094280 - 0.942452 = +0.151828
- bearing = atan2(0.174040, 0.151828): both positive → Q1
  - angle = atan(0.174040/0.151828) = atan(1.1463) ≈ 48.9° → bearing ≈ +48.9°
- delta = 48.9° - (-98.266°) = +147.17°
- Normalize: 147.17° < 180, so delta = +147.17° → steer LEFT

**Boundary check:**
- is_left_of_center = false (right of center)
- edge_distance = (0.762/2) - 0.184 = 0.381 - 0.184 = 0.197m → just below 0.20m
- delta = +147.17° → steer left (away from right edge) → safe

|delta| > 50°: speed=0.75, steering_angle=+25.0

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Sharp left curve continues ahead with car on right side of track; delta≈+147° requires maximum left steering to follow the curve and avoid going off-track.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track total 121 waypoints, ~17.7m length.",
    "WP0-20: long straight along y≈0.683 heading east.",
    "WP24-44: left curve from east to west, requires sustained positive steering.",
    "WP44-55: straight westward along y≈2.77.",
    "WP82-96: sharp south/southeast curve — large positive delta, need max left steering.",
    "WP97-110: heading ~-98 to -101°, sharp left turn continues — delta near +140-150°, use max steering_angle=+25 at speed=0.75.",
    "Car consistently right of center (distance_from_center ~0.18m) in WP100-107 region.",
    "When |delta|>50°, use steering_angle=+25 at speed=0.75.",
    "When |delta|<5°, use steering_angle=0 to avoid oscillation.",
    "Progress ~86.4% at step 179 — on track, continuing through sharp left curve."
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [0.948, 0.934, 0.931, 0.934, 0.942],
    "y": [1.731, 1.651, 1.592, 1.536, 1.492],
    "heading": [-107.727, -106.065, -103.907, -101.070, -98.266]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP107 at (1.094, 1.666): bearing≈+48.9°, delta≈+147.2° → maximum left correction needed.",
  "speed": 0.75,
  "steering_angle": 25.0
}
```
